params.name: channel_id
params.description: The ID of the Knock Slack channel to get channels for.

params.name: access_token_object
params.description: A JSON encoded string containing the access token object reference.

params.name: query_options.cursor
params.description: Paginate through collections of data by setting the cursor parameter to a next_cursor attribute returned by a previous request's response_metadata. Default value fetches the first "page" of the collection.

params.name: query_options.limit
params.description: The maximum number of channels to return. Defaults to 200.

params.name: query_options.exclude_archived
params.description: Set to true to exclude archived channels from the list. Defaults to `true` when not explicitly provided.

params.name: query_options.types
params.description: Mix and match channel types by providing a comma-separated list of any combination of public_channel, private_channel, mpim, im. Defaults to `"public_channel,private_channel"`. If the user's Slack ID is unavailable, this option is ignored and only public channels are returned.

params.name: query_options.team_id
params.description: Encoded team ID (T1234) to list channels in, required if org token is used.

items.docs: List Slack channels for a Slack workspace.

params.name: channel_id
params.description: The ID of the Knock Microsoft Teams channel to check.

params.name: ms_teams_tenant_object
params.description: A JSON encoded string containing the Microsoft Teams tenant object reference.

items.docs: Check if a connection to Microsoft Teams has been authorized for a given Microsoft Teams tenant object.

items.docs: Check if a Slack channel is authenticated.

params.name: ms_teams_tenant_object
params.description: A JSON encoded string containing the Microsoft Teams tenant object reference.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Microsoft Teams team ID.

params.name: query_options.$filter
params.description: [OData param](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/query-parameters) passed to the Microsoft Graph API to filter channels.

params.name: query_options.$select
params.description: [OData param](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/query-parameters) passed to the Microsoft Graph API to select specific properties.

items.docs: List the Microsoft Teams channels within a team. By default, archived and private channels are excluded from the results.

params.name: channel_id
params.description: The ID of the Knock Slack channel to revoke access for.

params.name: access_token_object
params.description: A JSON encoded string containing the access token object reference.

params.name: channel_id
params.description: The ID of the Knock Microsoft Teams channel to get teams for.

params.name: ms_teams_tenant_object
params.description: A JSON encoded string containing the Microsoft Teams tenant object reference.

params.name: query_options.$filter
params.description: [OData param](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/query-parameters) passed to the Microsoft Graph API to filter teams.

params.name: query_options.$select
params.description: [OData param](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/query-parameters) passed to the Microsoft Graph API to select fields on a team.

params.name: query_options.$top
params.description: [OData param](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/query-parameters) passed to the Microsoft Graph API to limit the number of teams returned.

params.name: query_options.$skiptoken
params.description: [OData param](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/query-parameters) passed to the Microsoft Graph API to retrieve the next page of results.
